name: APEX Platform
postCreateCommand: cd apex/backend && pip install -r requirements.txt --break-system-packages && cd ../frontend && npm install
postStartCommand: cd /workspaces/EstimatingEngine && python -m uvicorn apex.backend.main:app --reload --port 8000 & cd apex/frontend && npm run dev &

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API key for Claude LLM integration
